query: ok so I just finished setting up the project with /new-project and I have my PROJECT.md ready. now I need to figure out what order to build everything in -- can you break this down into phases with clear milestones? I want to be able to demo progress to my cofounder after each chunk of work

I need to restructure my roadmap. right now phase 3 is this massive 'backend services' phase that takes forever. can we split it up and reorganize so I can ship features faster? the roadmap is in .planning/ROADMAP.md
we just discovered a critical auth vulnerability and need to squeeze in a security hardening phase ASAP. it should go right after the current phase 2. can you insert it into the roadmap?

my PM wants to see a high-level delivery plan for this project -- something that shows what we're building in what order, with success criteria for each milestone. we already have the project definition in .planning/PROJECT.md
I want to reprioritize -- payments should come before the analytics dashboard because we need revenue flowing. can you reorder the phases in the roadmap?

the requirements changed pretty significantly since we created the roadmap. I think we need to redo it from scratch, keeping the phases we already completed but replanning the rest. can you replace the remaining roadmap?

I have a new react native app idea -- it's a neighborhood events app where people post local events, RSVP, and chat about them. I wrote up the vision in a google doc. can you help me figure out the build phases? I want vertical slices so each sprint ships something I can show to users
we need to add a phase for internationalization -- the app needs to support Spanish and French before launch. it's not urgent but should be in the roadmap somewhere
how many sprints do you think this project will take? I'm trying to give my manager a rough timeline. the project details are in .planning/PROJECT.md and I already have a roadmap

I've got this e-commerce backend with about 15 microservices defined in my PROJECT.md. need to figure out a sane build order where I can test the checkout flow end-to-end as early as possible instead of building all the services first then integrating
can you look at the code in src/components/Dashboard.tsx and fix the chart rendering bug? the bars are overlapping when there are more than 10 data points
I need to write unit tests for the authentication module. can you generate vitest tests for src/lib/auth.ts covering the login, signup, and token refresh flows?
help me set up a CI/CD pipeline with github actions. I want it to run tests on PR, build on merge to main, and deploy to vercel automatically
I need to plan phase 3 of my project -- break down the goals into executable tasks with dependencies. the roadmap already exists, I just need the detailed plan for this specific phase
can you review the pull request at #47? I want to know if there are any security issues or performance concerns before I merge it
I want to brainstorm some feature ideas for the app. we're thinking about adding social features but not sure what would resonate with users. can we do a brainstorming session?
deploy my backend to fly.io. the Dockerfile is already set up, I just need help with the fly.toml config and getting the secrets configured
can you research what the best libraries are for implementing real-time WebSocket communication in a Next.js app? I need to understand the options before we plan the next phase

I need to create a new project from scratch. here's my idea: a meal planning app that suggests recipes based on dietary preferences and generates grocery lists. can you help me define what this project is?

we had a retrospective and the team thinks phase 4 needs more discussion before we plan it. there are some open questions about whether to use GraphQL or REST. can we have that discussion and capture the decisions?
